name: Mocha Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Semi Sweet Chocolate Chips, Mini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, 1 cup of chocolate chips, and melted butter. Mix well.
2. Pat the mixture firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and the top 2 1/2 inches of the sides. Set aside.
3. In a small saucepan, combine milk and instant coffee. Sprinkle gelatin on top. Let sit for 1 minute.
4. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the gelatin and coffee dissolve. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until creamy. Beat in the sweetened condensed milk and gelatin mixture.
6. Fold in the whipped cream and remaining 1 cup of chocolate chips.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Chill until firm (about 2 hours).
8. Run a knife around the edge of the cake to separate it from the pan, then remove the rim.
9. Makes 1 9-inch Cheesecake.
